title: Add INDEX on offline_messages.to_pub_id for drain() performance
description:
relay/src/store.rs lines 196-212 (drain method) performs full table scans on offline_messages without an index.

Every client reconnect triggers:
  SELECT ... WHERE to_pub_id = ? (line 199)
  DELETE FROM ... WHERE to_pub_id = ? (line 206)

Both queries are O(N) without an index. As the queue grows (N users × 72h retention), queries degrade.

Fix: In Store::new(), add after line 78:
  CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_offline_messages_to_pub_id ON offline_messages(to_pub_id)

This converts both queries to O(log N) + O(K) where K = messages for that user.

Real efficiency issue, not correctness. Mark as P2.
